steps.title: Read from the trend line
steps.content: Use the line of best fit, not an individual point. At $1.2$ astronomical units from the Sun, the line predicts a density between $4.5$ and $4.75$ grams per cubic centimeter.

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The listed value in that interval is $4.6$ grams per cubic centimeter. The answer is C.
